text: Parts 1 to 3, 5 to 19, and 21 of this article, part 1 of article 2 of this title, and part 5 of article 5 of title 43 , C.R.S., shall be known and may be cited as the “Uniform Safety Code of 1935”.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-101 — Short title

Parts 1 to 3, 5 to 19, and 21 of this article, part 1 of article 2 of this title, and part 5 of article 5 of title 43 , C.R.S., shall be known and may be cited as the “Uniform Safety Code of 1935”.

subsections.text: Parts 1 to 3, 5 to 19, and 21 of this article, part 1 of article 2 of this title, and part 5 of article 5 of title 43 , C.R.S., shall be known and may be cited as the “Uniform Safety Code of 1935”.
